player: The sky changed while we were moving.
maya: Lightning at this frequency disrupts the Sentinels' sensor array.
It's cover. If we can stay ahead of the funnel.

system: The sky turns the color of a bruise.
The funnel wall hits the road two hundred yards north.
maya: Keep moving. Don't stop for any of them.

system: Lightning splits a grain silo directly overhead.
The Sentinels stagger. Their targeting blinks out for six seconds.
It steps out of the rain.
Warden Six. You thought you left it in Appalachia.
maya: This whole chapter. It's been behind us the whole chapter.

system: It goes down in the mud.
Lightning again. The funnel wall is sixty yards east.
maya: We can make it to the tower if we run.

system: The plains stretch out flat and grey and washed clean.
